name: Wine Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix cake mix, pudding mix, oil, sherry and nutmeg in a large bowl until blended.
3. Add one egg at a time, blending on medium speed after each addition.
4. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
5. Pour batter into a Bundt pan.
6. Place in 350°F oven.
7. Bake for 50 minutes.
8. Remove from pan immediately.
